cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. There are five team members: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts in a specific position. The problem is about tracking their position swaps step by step. I need to figure out where Bob ends up after all the swaps. After swapping, Dave becomes right midfielder and Bob becomes cheerleader. So after first swap: - Alice: right winger (unchanged) - Bob: cheerleader - Claire: left winger (unchanged) - Dave: right midfielder - Eve: goalkeeper (unchanged) Second swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. Now, Dave is right midfielder and Eve is goalkeeper. After swapping, Dave becomes goalkeeper and Eve becomes right midfielder. Alice is right winger and Bob is cheerleader. After swapping, Alice becomes cheerleader and Bob becomes right winger. After third swap: - Alice: cheerleader - Bob: right winger - Claire: left winger - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: right midfielder Fourth swap: Dave and Claire trade positions. Dave is goalkeeper, Claire is left winger. After swapping, Dave becomes left winger and Claire becomes goalkeeper. After fourth swap: - Alice: cheerleader - Bob: right winger - Claire: goalkeeper - Dave: left winger - Eve: right midfielder Fifth swap: Dave and Eve trade positions again. Dave is left winger, Eve is right midfielder. After swapping, Dave becomes right midfielder and Eve becomes left winger. After fifth swap: - Alice: cheerleader - Bob: right winger - Claire: goalkeeper - Dave: right midfielder - Eve: left winger The question is asking where Bob is playing at the end. According to this final arrangement, Bob is right winger, which is option A. Wait, but let me double-check each step to make sure I didn't make any mistakes. Starting positions again: 1. Correct. Second swap: Dave (now right midfielder) and Eve (goalkeeper) swap. So Dave is goalkeeper, Eve is right midfielder. Third swap: Alice (right winger) and Bob (cheerleader) swap. So Alice is cheerleader, Bob is right winger. That's correct. Fourth swap: Dave (goalkeeper) and Claire (left winger) swap. Dave becomes left winger, Claire becomes goalkeeper. Fifth swap: Dave (left winger) and Eve (right midfielder) swap. Dave becomes right midfielder, Eve becomes left winger. So final positions: - Alice: cheerleader - Bob: right winger - Claire: goalkeeper - Dave: right midfielder - Eve: left winger Yes, Bob is right winger. So the answer should be option A.
